SOC 2.0
FOR SME

Enjoy Essential Cyber Security Solutions Designed Specifically For Your SME.

  • It's All About Big Protection For Small Budgets!
  • We Tailor Enterprise-Grade Security For Your SME!
  • Get The Best Soc Services Even If You Have One Server!

The Cyber threat Landscape

For Malaysian SMEs

Real Threat. Real Impact. Real Losses.

Approximately 269,533 phishing attempts were targeted against Malaysian SMEs in the first half of 2020, 56% more than the first half of 2019 at 172,906.

Small Businesses Are More Frequent Targets Of Cyberattacks Than Larger Companies: New Report

In Malaysia, Kaspersky Security Network recorded some 767,000 business owners coming under attack from Internet-borne malware last year.

Malaysian SMEs need to stop and think about cybersecurity - Study

Two-thirds of Malaysian SMEs lost customer information to incidents - Cisco

84% of SMEs fell to cyber attack last year

Investigation ongoing on MyIDENTITY data breach, no arrests yet

Official website of Penang govt hacked

Cybersecurity gap threatens SMEs' digitalisation

Malaysia Loses RM2.23 Billion To Cybercrime

Kaspersky: Phishing attacks on the rise in Malaysia, SE Asia

Malaysia catat 57.8 juta serangan virus siber pada suku pertama - Fortinet

Cybersecurity is still challenging for ASEAN businesses

Cyber-security threats to cost Malaysian organisations US$12.2bil in economic losses

Empowering SMEs with Vital Cybersecurity Solutions

SOC as a service for SMEs
Why us?

Ready to turbocharge your SME's cybersecurity defenses and outsmart cyber threats together?

Advanced Threat Detection and Response

Protect your SME with our SOC-as-a-Service, delivering immediate threat detection and rapid response. Our AI-powered algorithms proactively defend against evolving cyber threats, while automated incident response mechanisms swiftly mitigate risks.

Scalability and Integration

Grow your business confidently with our SOC-as-a-Service for SMEs, seamlessly integrating with your existing IT infrastructure. Whether you're a startup or a medium-sized enterprise, our solution scales to meet your evolving needs.

Expertise and Support

Gain round-the-clock SME defense support from our team of cybersecurity professionals. With dedicated analysts providing personalized assistance, your business receives top-tier protection and support.

Compliance and Regulatory Requirements

Stay compliant effortlessly with our SOC-as-a-Service for SMEs, equipped with comprehensive compliance management tools. Meet regional regulatory requirements without hassle.

Cost and Resource Efficiency

Optimize your budget with our transparent pricing and cost-effective packages. Our SOC-as-a-Service for SMEs, deliver essential cybersecurity protection without hidden costs, ensuring peace of mind.

Customization and Managed Services

Tailor your SME security solution with our customizable packages, designed to meet your unique business goals. Benefit from hassle-free implementation and ongoing management with our managed services.

A Reality Check

Secure your SME to Secure Your Assets

Ramp Up Defenses Against Rising Cyber Threats!

Each year, small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) face a growing number of cyberattacks. Nearly half of SMEs experience reputation damage with just one cyberattack.

Protect your business and secure your future. Don't become just another statistic. Take proactive steps today.

51%
Alarming Increase: Cyber Crime surges 51% in Malaysia from 2022 to 2023
48%
Lack of Preparedness: Nearly half of SMEs are unready for Cyberattacks
46
Reputation Damage: Data Breaches impact 46% of SMEs
37%
Ransomware Surge: Malaysia records over 37% increase in attacks in 2022

EXPERIENCE . LEARN . EVOLVE

Cybertronium

MDR/SOC-as-a-Service

Affordable cybersecurity solutions for growing businesses!

Advanced Threat Detection

Utilize cutting-edge threat intelligence and analytics to spot potential threats across your digital terrain. Our service offers robust protection against complex cyber threats, ensuring your enterprise stays resilient in the face of evolving risks.

Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)

Gain valuable insights into your security landscape with our advanced SIEM services. Collect, analyze, and respond to security data and events across your enterprise, enhancing your ability to detect and respond to threats.

Endpoint Detection and Response (EDR)

Secure every endpoint, from laptops to mobile devices, against sophisticated attacks. Our EDR solutions provide real-time monitoring, threat detection, and automated response capabilities to safeguard your critical assets.

Extended Detection and Response (XDR)

With our Extended Detection and Response (XDR) solution, enterprises can strengthen their cybersecurity posture, proactively detect and respond to emerging threats, and safeguard their critical business assets against cyber attacks.

Security Orchestration and Automated Response

Streamline your security operations with our SOAR capabilities. Automate responses to common threats, freeing up your team to focus on strategic defense measures and complex threat analysis.

Cloud Security

Secure your cloud environments with our comprehensive cloud security solutions. Protect your data, applications, and infrastructure from threats, ensuring the safety and privacy of your cloud-based resources.

Proactive Threat Hunting

Go beyond automated defenses with our proactive threat hunting services. Our experts actively seek out hidden threats using advanced tools and techniques, ensuring your defenses stay ahead of the game.

Incident Response and Recovery

Experience swift, coordinated incident response that minimizes downtime and mitigates damage. Our 24/7 response team ensures rapid recovery, getting your operations back to normal with minimal impact.

Continuous Vulnerability Management

Identify and address vulnerabilities before they can be exploited. Our continuous vulnerability management service provides ongoing assessment and remediation support, fortifying your defenses and enhancing your security posture.

Regulatory Compliance

Navigate complex regulatory landscapes with ease using our comprehensive compliance suite. We ensure your cybersecurity measures meet industry standards and regulatory requirements, protecting your business from legal and financial repercussions.

Threat Intelligence

With our Threat Intelligence solution, enterprises can stay one step ahead of cyber adversaries, effectively mitigate risks, and safeguard their critical assets against evolving cyber threats.

Dark Web Monitoring

With our Dark Web Monitoring services, organizations can stay one step ahead of cyber threats, safeguard their digital assets, and maintain trust and confidence among their stakeholders.

Ready to get started?

We're here to enhance SME security, today! Reach out to schedule an introductory call with one of our team members before it's too late!
